mapper.select: SELECT r.invitee_user_id, r.status, r.total_rebate, r.create_time AS register_time, u.nick_name, u.avatar FROM aid_invite_relation r LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.user_id = r.invitee_user_id WHERE r.inviter_user_id = #{inviterUserId} AND r.del_flag = '0' ORDER BY r.id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE aid_invite_relation SET total_rebate = GREATEST(total_rebate + #{delta}, 0), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND del_flag = '0'
